title: Les malheurs de Sophie
writer: Colette Audry, Pierre Laroche, La Comtesse de Ségur
actors: Madeleine Rousset, Marguerite Moreno, Michel Auclair
plot: Sophie de Réan, an unruly mischievous little girl grows up under the thumb of Mademoiselle, her strict governess. Following her mother's death, she is entrusted to Mme de Fleurville, her aunt, who at the same time hires Mademoisel...
